name: Swiss Oat 'n Apple Cereal
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups Quaker Oat Bran hot cereal (uncooked)
1 cup Quaker Oats (quick or old-fashioned), uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Cover the bowl and refrigerate overnight or up to one week.
3. To serve, place 3/4 cup of cereal in a microwavable bowl.
4. Heat on HIGH for 1 minute 30 seconds to 2 minutes, stirring well until heated through.
5. Serve cold or hot with skim milk or low-fat yogurt if desired (approximately 345 calories per 3/4 cup serving).
